name: Voruna Prime Glyph - Bright
description: A glyph depicting Voruna Prime on a bright background.

languages.name: 보루나 프라임 글리프 - 밝음

languages.name: Glifo de Voruna Prime - Brillante

languages.name: Glifo: Voruna Prime (Claro)
